name: Gitea With Mariadb
tagline: Gitea is a self-hosted, lightweight Git service, offering version control, collaboration, and code hosting.
description:
Gitea is a self-hosted, lightweight Git service, offering version control, collaboration, and code hosting.

Docs: https://docs.gitea.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    environment:
      - USER_UID=1000
      - USER_GID=1000
      - GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=mysql
      - GITEA__database__HOST=mariadb
      - GITEA__database__NAME=${MYSQL_DATABASE-gitea}
      - GITEA__database__USER=ud385c88004
      - GITEA__database__PASSWD=ab555595c92d2f23a46e89b9630e477f
    volumes:
      - gitea-data:/data
      - gitea-timezone:/etc/timezone:ro
      - gitea-localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    depends_on:
      mariadb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42041:80
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - gitea-mariadb-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_USER=ud385c88004
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=ab555595c92d2f23a46e89b9630e477f
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-gitea_with_mariadb}
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=587232fcbb315fac8ce451fe7b6b5296
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  gitea-data: null
  gitea-timezone: null
  gitea-localtime: null
  gitea-mariadb-data: null
